title: Bimbisara

title: Calvary Swar

subTitle: Srikar marries Avani despite his mom's objections. As Avani navigates the ups and downs of their relationship, she must prove herself and earn her place in Srikar's family.

title: Srikaram Subhakaram

title: Omkaram
subTitle: A renowned astrologer predicts the future of the people and offers remedies to viewers suffering from problems in their personal and professional lives.

subTitle: After his father declares he can only marry if he finds a husband for his sister first, Ramu is determined to get his twin, Lakshmi, married to her crush.

title: Mukku Pudaka
subTitle: Srikar marries Avani despite his mom's objections. As Avani navigates the ups and downs of their relationship, she must prove herself and earn her place in Srikar's family.

title: Ummadi Kutumbam
subTitle: Three brothers enjoy a close-knit life until misunderstandings shake their bond. To restore their happiness, they must confront their issues and learn the importance of family unity once more.

title: Deergha Sumangali Bhava
subTitle: Ahalya loves Indra, a soldier, but he dies. Heartbroken, she faces a new path. Gowtham, Indra's brother, enters her life. She must decide her future with him.

subTitle: Gundamma favors her own kids, neglecting her kind stepdaughter. She wants to marry her daughters to rich men. Two brothers plot to expose her hypocrisy and teach her a lesson on kindness and family.

subTitle: Kanaka Mahalakshmi faces rejection from her NRI relatives and is pressured into an unwanted marriage. How will she confront these challenges and navigate her way to a better future?

subTitle: Tripura and Bala navigate a forest escape, only to be chased by goons who tie him up. Meanwhile, Anantakrishna and Vasudev are on a frantic search for him.

title: Gharana Mogudu
subTitle: Venkatesh discovers he is next in line to inherit the family business, but his scheming aunt stands in the way. He secretly devises a plan to outsmart her and support his struggling mother.

title: Kongu Bangaram
subTitle: Jhansi Devi reforms her grandson Ravi with Bangari's help, hoping he will lead her business empire. Their clash grows into a fight over the family's destiny.

title: Prema Yuddham
subTitle: Kalyan teaches dance and falls in love with his student. Their love faces many hurdles, but they fight to stay together.

title: Babu Bangaram

title: Chamanthi
